cognitive_state.current_focus: Consolidating and presenting the complete Phoenix Logging Protocol (V1.2).

synthesis_event: The complete documentation suite for `UMB-PHX-LOG-001` has been meticulously compiled and rendered across the polyglot stack. This action serves as a definitive record, solidifying the AISTF's commitment to ethical, auditable, and learning-integrated logging practices. The architectural intent, operational logic, command interfaces, and experiential telemetry are now fully synchronized and accessible for any system or human operator.
